text:

Author: pi

Log:
  graphics/blender: update 2.83.2 -> 2.90.0

  - This version uses 64 bit atomic functions so does not build on i386
    probably also fails on other 32 bit platforms

  Submitted by:	FreeBSD@ShaneWare.Biz (maintainer)
